The stopwatch measures to 1/100th of a second, showing you the time, date and day of the week. They announce every full hour with a beep and you can easily set an alarm. They also offer a 12 or 24-hour mode and a countdown timer (from less than 10 hours). The countdown can then be paused for up to 30 seconds. You will also find it useful to set the step frequency between 10 and 320 steps per 1 minute, the pedometer and the walking or running pace. Thanks to the rubberised surface and knurling, they do not slip and are easy to hold. The stopwatch also has a power saving mode in case of inactivity. They are waterproof and you can hang them comfortably around your neck with a lanyard. items.raw_desc: Táska Leki Trekking Pole Bag:A Leki Trekking Pole Bag táska tökéletes megoldás a túrabotjaid biztonságos tárolásához és könnyű szállításához.
